## Verification Checklist

- [ ] All claims cite specific document numbers
- [ ] Findings verified against original DOJ documents
- [ ] No victim identifying information included
- [ ] No residential addresses or current location data
- [ ] No classified or non-public material
- [ ] Clearly distinguishes documented evidence from inference
